response:
Sec. 1  
people allergic to peanuts cannot live underwater because their bodies cannot process the chemicals in water  
allergies to peanuts are triggered by proteins that are not soluble in water  
the immune system of allergic individuals reacts to foreign substances in the environment  
the lack of oxygen in water affects the body's ability to function properly  
the body's systems are not adapted to the conditions of underwater environments  

Sec. 2  
the human body is designed for air based environments and not for water based environments  
the absence of oxygen in water can lead to rapid deterioration of health  
the physical and chemical properties of water make it incompatible with human survival  
the body's systems are not equipped to handle the changes in pressure and temperature underwater
